name: code-review-context
tagline: Rules for how the Codex agent's model-visible context is built: no rewrites, bounded item sizes, 10K token cap, struct-based fragments.
verdict: Safe, concrete numeric rules (10K token cap, 1K-token P0 threshold) with no security issues. The two-word description gives no trigger cue, no output format is defined, and rule 6's struct/trait requirement has no example.

highlights.summary: No situation or task type named — pure topic label, no trigger cue.
No output shape or location is defined for how compliance with these rules should be reported.
Non-obvious structural requirement with no example struct/trait implementation shown.
